remaining_tasks.name: Verify E2E tests actually pass by running them

blockers.description: On-disk Playwright report shows 92 tests all SKIPPED — no proof tests actually pass. The .last-run.json is stale (Mar 16). Phase 26 SUMMARY claims 29 passed/2 failed but no independent artifact confirms this.
blockers.workaround: Run `cd tests && npx playwright test` with Docker stack running (yarn dev)

human_actions_pending.action: Run E2E tests to verify they pass: ensure Docker stack is up (yarn dev), then cd tests && npx playwright test
human_actions_pending.context: Milestone audit passed on paper (20/20 requirements) but the Playwright report on disk shows 92 skipped tests, not actual passes

decisions.decision: Milestone audit status set to 'passed' based on VERIFICATION.md and SUMMARY.md evidence
decisions.rationale: All 3-source cross-references (VERIFICATION + SUMMARY frontmatter + REQUIREMENTS.md) agree on 20/20 satisfied

decisions.decision: 14 tech debt items catalogued as non-blocking
decisions.rationale: All are pre-existing, cosmetic, or deferred to v1.4 scope

decisions.decision: Nyquist compliance is partial (1 compliant, 3 partial, 1 missing)
decisions.rationale: Only Phase 22 has full nyquist validation; Phases 23-26 have draft or missing VALIDATION.md

next_action: Either run E2E tests (yarn dev + cd tests && npx playwright test) to get independent proof, or proceed directly with /gsd:complete-milestone v1.3 if you trust the SUMMARY evidence
context_notes: All 5 phases of v1.3 Svelte 5 Migration (Content) are complete and verified. Milestone audit created and shows 20/20 requirements satisfied with integration checker confirming all cross-phase wiring. The only open question is whether the E2E tests actually pass — the on-disk Playwright report from Mar 20 shows 92 skipped (not run). The Phase 26 executor agents claim tests were run and passed but we cannot confirm from artifacts.
